notes: Claude Code is the primary/reference target — most dotai fields map 1:1
Model names use aliases (sonnet, opus, haiku) not full model IDs
Hook events use PascalCase (PreToolUse) unlike other tools (camelCase)
SSE transport is deprecated — warn users to migrate to HTTP
CLAUDE.md files concatenate when multiple rules share the same outputDir
Scoped rules use YAML paths: frontmatter in .claude/rules/
Ignore patterns are lossy — mapped to deny rules on Read/Edit tools
Hook handler supports 4 types: command, http, prompt, agent
settings.json has $schema reference for validation
New: .claude/settings.local.json for local project overrides (gitignored)
New: Managed policy CLAUDE.md at system-wide paths
New: @import syntax in CLAUDE.md for pulling in external files
New: claudeMdExcludes setting to skip CLAUDE.md files in monorepos
New: Auto memory at ~/.claude/projects/<project>/memory/
New: Plugin system with .claude-plugin/plugin.json manifests
New: OAuth config for MCP servers (clientId, callbackPort, authServerMetadataUrl)
New: MCP Tool Search for dynamic tool loading (ENABLE_TOOL_SEARCH)
New: Agent memory scopes (user, project, local) with persistent directories
New: --agents CLI flag for session-scoped JSON agent definitions
New: Sandbox filesystem/network granular config (allowWrite, denyRead, allowedDomains)
New: Read/Edit permission patterns follow gitignore spec with //, ~/, / prefixes
New: Agent(name) permission rules for controlling subagent access
New: Skill context:fork with agent field for isolated execution
New: !`command` bash injection syntax in skills
New: Hook timeout unit is seconds (not milliseconds) per official docs
New: $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR env var in hook commands
New: Model aliases opusplan (opus plan + sonnet exec), default (tier-dependent), sonnet[1m] (1M context)
New: Skill(name) permission rules for controlling skill access
New: Built-in agents: Bash, statusline-setup, claude-code-guide
New: effortLevel setting (low/medium/high) for adaptive reasoning effort
New: availableModels setting to restrict model selection
New: teammateMode setting (auto/in-process/tmux)
New: MCP resources via @server:protocol://path mentions
New: MCP prompts as /mcp__server__prompt commands
New: Nested directory skill discovery in monorepos
New: Bundled skills: /simplify, /batch, /debug, /loop, /claude-api
New: Agent teams orchestration feature
